title: scutellaria hirta
intro: Scutellaria hirta, also known as the rough skullcap, is a perennial herb native to eastern North America. It belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is a member of the Scutellaria genus, which includes various species of skullcap plants. The medicinal properties of Scutellaria hirta are attributed to its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which are known for their anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria hirta include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, and it can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture for herbal use.
